final:
module RefModule (
    input wire data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    output reg data_out
);
    reg stored_data;

    always @(*) begin
  if (write_enable) begin stored_data <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (read_enable) begin data_out <= stored_data ; end
  end
endmodule
